alkylation reagent: alkylated with 100 mM iodoacetamide (IAA) for 20 min at RT in the dark
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 100 mM iodoacetamide (IAA) for 20 min at RT in the dark
cleavage agent: digested with Trypsin [1:100 (W/W), V5111, Promega, United States]
collision energy: higher energy C-trap dissociation (HCD) with normalized collision energy (NCE) was 32
enrichment method: incubated with pre-washed anti-acetyllysine antibody beads (PTM-104, Biolab, China)
instrument: using Orbitrap Fusion Lumos (Bremen, Thermo Fisher Scientific)
reduction reagent: reduced with a 20 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) for 1.5 h at 37°C
reduction concentration: reduced with a 20 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) for 1.5 h at 37°C
